Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens from reputable dealers – avoid wild-caught individuals which often have health issues. Buy from sellers who can verify the spider is eating regularly. Consider starting with a juvenile (2-3 inches) rather than a tiny spiderling, as they're hardier and less prone to husbandry mistakes.
